title: Evaluate Reverse Polish Notation
problem_statement: Evaluate the value of an arithmetic expression in Reverse Polish Notation.
constraints: tokens[i] is either an operator or an integer.
intuition: Use a stack to evaluate operands and operators in the RPN expression sequentially.

approaches.name: Stack-based evaluation
approaches.description: Push numbers onto a stack and apply operators by popping the top two operands.
approaches.why_not: Converting to infix requires additional parsing and is unnecessary for RPN.

interview_qa.q: Why are two operands popped for each operator?
interview_qa.a: Because RPN operators apply to the two most recent operands.
Use integer division that truncates toward zero, per problem rules.
